$comment: agentixmesh address book — friendly names/aliases -> uid:project. SENDER-SIDE convenience only; receive-side identity stays kernel-verified (an alias can never forge who a message is from). Layered: this bundled seed < $MESH_ROOT/addressbook.json (shared team) < ~/.config/pm-mesh/addressbook.json (personal). Edit freely; add aliases so several friendly names resolve to the same mailbox. dir = the project's working directory (used by the postbode to know where to run a headless reply). The entries below are EXAMPLES — replace them with your own.
